raw_consumer_statement: I applied for a Macy 's credit card & used it that same day towards the end of XXXX to purchase my daughters homecoming shoes. I ONLY used it that day because the card never came in the mail. I call & complained that it never showed up. The person I talked to said there are charges of $ XXXX and XXXX other charges of $ XXXX. I explained I never made those purchases & the only purchase I made was the same day the card was opened. She claimed she updated my address ( not sure why it was different from what I typed in their machine at the store to apply for the card ) She then said they'd send a replacement card. I did get a card in the mail. & assumed everything was fixed. I went to use my card today ( XX/XX/16 ) & it was declined. I called & was told my total charges are $ XXXX when I never made ANY of these purchases! There was additional $ XXXX added onto my credit card account! They're telling me it'll take XXXX more months to get this fixed & I've had issues since XXXX!
